sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ التَّحْضِيرُ الْجَيِّدُ لِمُقَابَلَةِ الْعَمَلِ خُطْوَةً حَاسِمَةً فِي مَسِيرَةِ الْفَرْدِ الْمِهْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dobra priprema za intervju za posao smatra se ključnim korakom u profesionalnoj karijeri pojedinca.
sentences.translationEn: Good preparation for a job interview is considered a crucial step in an individual's professional career.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُتَقَدِّمِ أَنْ يَبْحَثَ بِعُمْقٍ عَنْ تَارِيخِ الشَّرِكَةِ وَأَهْدَافِهَا لِيُظْهِرَ اهْتِمَامَهُ الْحَقِيقِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Kandidat mora duboko istražiti historiju i ciljeve kompanije kako bi pokazao svoj istinski interes.
sentences.translationEn: The applicant must research the company's history and goals deeply to show genuine interest.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُنْصَحُ بِتَدْرِيبِ النَّفْسِ عَلَى الْإِجَابَةِ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ الشَّائِعَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَوُضُوضٍ تَامٍّ.
sentences.translation: Također se savjetuje vježbanje odgovaranja na uobičajena pitanja s povjerenjem i potpunom jasnoćom.
sentences.translationEn: It is also recommended to practice answering common questions with confidence and complete clarity.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ لُغَةَ الْجَسَدِ تَلْعَبُ دَوْرًا جَوْهَرِيًّا فِي تَرْكِ انْطِبَاعٍ إِيجَابِيٍّ لَدَى أَصْحَابِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Govor tijela igra suštinsku ulogu u ostavljanju pozitivnog utiska na poslodavce.
sentences.translationEn: Body language plays an essential role in leaving a positive impression on employers.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ فِي عَرْضِ الْمَهَارَاتِ يَبْنِي جِسْرًا مِنَ الثِّقَةِ بَيْنَ الطَّرَفَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, iskrenost u predstavljanju vještina gradi most povjerenja između dvije strane.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, honesty in presenting skills builds a bridge of trust between both parties.
